Test Case Description (test Scenario): Submit buying request as existing user
Steps:
1. Launch the URL
2. Fill all required buying request fields with valid data
3. Click Submit
4. System prompts user to Sign In
5. User is redirected to Sign In tab
6. Enter registered Email and Password
7. Complete reCAPTCHA if prompted
8. Submit the buying request form
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Sign In page and after successful login the request is submitted and confirmation message is shown

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Submit buying request as new user
Steps:
1. Fill all required buying request fields with valid data
2. Click Submit
3. System prompts user to Sign Up
4. User enters First Name and Last Name
5. Enter Email address
6. Create Password
7. Select Country
8. Select State
9. Enter City
10. Click Sign Up
11. Complete reCAPTCHA
12. Submit the buying request form
Expected Result: User is redirected to Sign Up page
Priority: after successful signup the buying request is submitted and confirmation message is shown

Steps:
1. Launch the URL
2. Click Submit without entering any data
Expected Result: Inline error message should be displayed as "This field is required" along with textbox should be highlighted as red

Steps:
1. Fill all fields except Product Name
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Validation error for Product Name is shown

Steps:
1. Click file upload
2. Select a .exe file
3. Attempt to upload
Expected Result: Error message for unsupported file type

Steps:
1. Click file upload
2. Select an image >3MB
3. Attempt to upload
Expected Result: Error message for file size limit

Steps:
1. Enter invalid email (e.g., user@)
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Email validation error is shown

Steps:
1. Enter text in quantity field
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Quantity validation error is shown

Steps: 1. Upload 5 valid images
Expected Result: All images are uploaded and previewed

Steps: 1. Upload 6 images
Expected Result: Error message for exceeding image limit

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Switch to Service and submit valid request
Steps:
1. Select 'Service' radio
2. Fill required fields
3. Submit
Expected Result: Form is submitted successfully for service

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Enter maximum characters in Product Name
Steps:
1. Enter allowed characters in Product Name
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form accept input if within limit; error if exceeded

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Enter past date in Expiry Date
Steps:
1. Enter a date before today
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Expiry date validation error is shown

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Enter valid future date in Expiry Date
Steps:
1. Enter a future date
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form accepts the expiry date

Steps:
1. Fill all required fields
2. Do not complete reCAPTCHA
3. Click Submit
Expected Result: Submission is blocked; error shown for reCAPTCHA

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Submit form with only required fields
Steps:
1. Fill only required fields
2. Leave optional fields blank
3. Click Submit
Expected Result: Form is submitted successfully

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Verify navigation links and UI elements
Steps: 1. Check presence and functionality of navigation links, buttons, and labels
Expected Result: All UI elements are present and functional

Steps: 1. Toggle between Product and Service radio buttons
Expected Result: Form updates accordingly and allows input for both

Steps:
1. Click file upload
2. Select valid image
Expected Result: File upload UI displays preview and file name

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Verify error message display and clearing
Steps:
1. Trigger validation error
2. Correct the input
Expected Result: Error message disappears after correction

Test Case Description (test Scenario): Existing user tries to sign up manually
Steps:
1. Submit buying request
2. Complete the buying request form
3. User manually switches to Sign Up tab
4. Enter First Name, Last Name, Email (already registered)
5. Enter password and other required details
6. Enter captcha
7. Click Sign Up
Expected Result: System should show warning message: User already exists / Email already registered and prompt user to Sign In
